nodes.name: ▶️ Execute Sub-workflow Trigger
🔧 Explode image_urls
nodes.notes: REHOST-00 — fan-out the input array into one n8n item per image, preserving slide index for ordering in the final aggregation.

nodes.name: 📥 HTTP GET — Download source image
nodes.notes: REHOST-01 — download source image as binary, preserving exp/sig query params from the source URL. No custom headers (Ideogram/FAL URLs carry their own auth in the query string).

nodes.name: 🔧 Build blob name
nodes.notes: REHOST-02 — generate YYYY/MM/DD/<uuid>.<ext> blob name. Content-Type defaults to image/jpeg, overridden to png/webp when detected from the source URL path.

nodes.name: 📤 HTTP PUT — Upload to Azure Blob
nodes.notes: REHOST-03 — PUT to Azure Blob with SAS. BlockBlob header is REQUIRED (set above in headerParameters). Retry is safe because PUT to a blob is idempotent (unlike Meta media_publish). Env vars are read only via {{ $env.* }} expression in this URL field (allowed), never inside a Code node (forbidden by CLAUDE.md).

nodes.name: 🔧 Build blob URL
nodes.notes: REHOST-04 — permanent public URL. Env vars read via {{ $env.* }} expression (allowed), NOT via $env inside a Code node (forbidden per CLAUDE.md). Uses a Set node so env references stay in expression fields only.

nodes.name: ✅ HTTP HEAD — Verify public reachability
nodes.notes: REHOST-05 — catches 'AllowBlobPublicAccess disabled' or wrong container access level. Returns 200 if the blob is publicly reachable. 403 = Azure Portal setup was not completed. No retry: fail fast, because a 403 here is configuration, not transient.

nodes.name: 🗂️ Collect blob_urls
nodes.notes: REHOST-06 — aggregate per-slide results into a single output item with blob_urls array sorted by slide_index. This is the return value that the parent workflow (Plan 02) consumes.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.YCLOUD_WHATSAPP_NUMBER, to: $json.approval_number, type: "text", text: { body: "❌ Error al re-alojar imagen para el post (slide " + ($json.slide_index || '?') + "). Post cancelado. Reintenta desde el Wizard." } }) }}

nodes.name: 📱 Notify Abort WA
nodes.notes: Abort notification — preserves slide_index in the WA message so Felix knows which image failed. Fires on the PUT error output (after 3 retries exhausted).

parameters.errorMessage: ={{ "Re-host failed for slide " + ($json.slide_index || 'unknown') + " after 3 retries. Post aborted." }}

nodes.name: 🛑 Stop And Error
nodes.notes: Halts the sub-workflow execution with an error so the main workflow sees a failed execution and does NOT proceed to Meta publish.

main.node: 📤 HTTP PUT — Upload to Azure Blob
